outcome_note: kaldi-asr/kaldi already ships a mature upstream ROCm/HIP backend (AMD, 2022-2023). We GPU-validated it on gfx90a (CDNA2 wave64) and gfx1100 (RDNA3 wave32) under ROCm 7.2.1; the only delta is launch-geometry modernization, too small to warrant a separate upstream PR. No PR; delivered as a validation record.
